title: [MTR] MAN Lion’s City E12 3-Door
description: A custom 3-door variant of the MAN Lion’s City E12 designed for realistic European urban and regional bus operations.
body:
This project adds a custom 3-door version of the MAN Lion’s City E12, adapted for realistic high-capacity urban transport use.

The model is designed to support modern European transit operations with a focus on accurate proportions, clean styling, and compatibility with multiple regional operator liveries and future expansion projects.

The 3-door layout improves realism for dense city and regional routes while providing a strong base for future fleet variations and ecosystem integration.

Original pack: [NPC's Electric Bus Pack](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/npcs-electric-bus-pack?utm_source=chatgpt.com)
